retention.heading: Data retention
retention.description: Automatically delete conversations after a period of inactivity. This permanently removes the chat, its messages, generated images, and documents created in it. Knowledge bases, skills, and other settings are not affected.
retention.periodLabel: Delete conversations inactive for longer than
retention.currentlyDisabled: Retention is disabled. Conversations are kept until deleted manually.
retention.saveError: Saving the data retention settings failed.
retention.invalidPeriod: The selected retention period is not allowed.
retention.loadError: The data retention settings could not be loaded.

confirm.title: Permanently delete old conversations?
confirm.body: Conversations with no activity for more than {{period}} will be permanently deleted on the next nightly run, and on an ongoing basis. This cannot be undone. Knowledge bases and skills are not affected.
